attributes.mlflow.spanInputs: {"messages": [{"content": "I need research on the best startup accelerators in Egypt and their application process", "additional_kwargs": {}, "response_metadata": {}, "type": "human", "name": null, "id": null}], "user_context": {"startup_name": "Test Startup", "stage": "pre-seed", "sector": "fintech", "location": "Egypt"}, "action": "route", "next_agent": "research", "search_query": "What are the best startup accelerators in Egypt and their application process?", "task_type": null, "final_plan": null, "research_data": null, "rag_data": null, "gap_analysis": null, "research_offline": null, "research_online": null, "final_reply": null}
attributes.mlflow.spanOutputs:
{"messages": [{"content": "I need research on the best startup accelerators in Egypt and their application process", "additional_kwargs": {}, "response_metadata": {}, "type": "human", "name": null, "id": "632854ef-6196-435b-9397-e47ee9b86db7"}], "user_context": {"startup_name": "Test Startup", "stage": "pre-seed", "sector": "fintech", "location": "Egypt"}, "next_agent": null, "action": "reply", "task_type": null, "search_query": null, "final_plan": null, "research_data": null, "rag_data": null, "gap_analysis": null, "research_offline": null, "research_online": null, "final_reply": "Here is a synthesis of the top startup accelerators in Egypt based on recent sources, focusing on those in Cairo and Alexandria, along with available details on their application processes. Note that specific application details are limited in the sources; most recommend checking official websites for current cycles, as processes typically involve online forms, pitch submissions, and interviews for early-stage startups.[1][2][3][4][5]

**Top Accelerators in Cairo:**
- **Falak Startups**: Cairo-based, backed by Egypt Ventures. Offers seed funding (up to EGP 2M), mentorship, and a 6-month program for seed to post-seed tech/innovation startups. Application: Via website; focuses on growth strategy and fundraising.[1][3]
- **Flat6Labs Cairo**: Leading MENA accelerator with seed funding, mentorship in tech, healthcare, fintech, climate, etc. Application: Online via flat6labs.com; cohort-based with equity for investment.[1][3][4]
- **Innoventures**: Early-stage funding and incubation (e.g., Startup Reactor) in tech, media, energy. Application: Submit via innoventures.vc.[1][4]
- **AUC Venture Lab (V-Lab)**: University-based at American University in Cairo, for tech-enabled startups (FinTech, EdTech, etc.). Over 130 investments. Application: Through aucventurerlab.org; open calls.[3][5]
- **GESR**: Early-stage tech/innovation support. Application details via gesr.com.[1][4]
- **Pmaestro**: Mentorship and funding for tech/innovation. Apply online.[1][4]
- **Startup MENA**: Industry-agnostic, mentorship and funding. Website application.[1][4]
- **MDI (Misr Digital Innovation)**: Tech-focused incubation. Contact via site.[1]

**Top Accelerators in Alexandria:**
- **AAST Entrepreneurship Center**: Supports agribusiness, tech, etc.; over 3600 startups. Application: Email ec@aast.edu or website; open to ideas.[2]
- **Founder Institute Alexandria**: Pre-seed, no idea required. Apply at fi.co; global program with local chapter.[2]
- **icealex / Startups of Alex**: Early-stage with workshops, labs. Apply via icealex.com or startupsofalex.untapcompete.com.[2]
- **Craft Pioneers / iceTech**: Creative/tech focus under icealex.[2]

For applications, processes are generally online submissions of team, idea, and traction details, followed by selection. Verify deadlines on official sites as they vary by cohort (e.g., Flat6Labs has regular batches).[1][2][7]"}

{"action": "reply", "next_agent": null, "search_query": null, "final_reply": "Here is a synthesis of the top startup accelerators in Egypt based on recent sources, focusing on those in Cairo and Alexandria, along with available details on their application processes. Note that specific application details are limited in the sources; most recommend checking official websites for current cycles, as processes typically involve online forms, pitch submissions, and interviews for early-stage startups.[1][2][3][4][5]

**Top Accelerators in Cairo:**
- **Falak Startups**: Cairo-based, backed by Egypt Ventures. Offers seed funding (up to EGP 2M), mentorship, and a 6-month program for seed to post-seed tech/innovation startups. Application: Via website; focuses on growth strategy and fundraising.[1][3]
- **Flat6Labs Cairo**: Leading MENA accelerator with seed funding, mentorship in tech, healthcare, fintech, climate, etc. Application: Online via flat6labs.com; cohort-based with equity for investment.[1][3][4]
- **Innoventures**: Early-stage funding and incubation (e.g., Startup Reactor) in tech, media, energy. Application: Submit via innoventures.vc.[1][4]
- **AUC Venture Lab (V-Lab)**: University-based at American University in Cairo, for tech-enabled startups (FinTech, EdTech, etc.). Over 130 investments. Application: Through aucventurerlab.org; open calls.[3][5]
- **GESR**: Early-stage tech/innovation support. Application details via gesr.com.[1][4]
- **Pmaestro**: Mentorship and funding for tech/innovation. Apply online.[1][4]
- **Startup MENA**: Industry-agnostic, mentorship and funding. Website application.[1][4]
- **MDI (Misr Digital Innovation)**: Tech-focused incubation. Contact via site.[1]

**Top Accelerators in Alexandria:**
- **AAST Entrepreneurship Center**: Supports agribusiness, tech, etc.; over 3600 startups. Application: Email ec@aast.edu or website; open to ideas.[2]
- **Founder Institute Alexandria**: Pre-seed, no idea required. Apply at fi.co; global program with local chapter.[2]
- **icealex / Startups of Alex**: Early-stage with workshops, labs. Apply via icealex.com or startupsofalex.untapcompete.com.[2]
- **Craft Pioneers / iceTech**: Creative/tech focus under icealex.[2]

For applications, processes are generally online submissions of team, idea, and traction details, followed by selection. Verify deadlines on official sites as they vary by cohort (e.g., Flat6Labs has regular batches).[1][2][7]"}

{"messages": [{"content": "I need research on the best startup accelerators in Egypt and their application process", "additional_kwargs": {}, "response_metadata": {}, "type": "human", "name": null, "id": "632854ef-6196-435b-9397-e47ee9b86db7"}], "user_context": {"startup_name": "Test Startup", "stage": "pre-seed", "sector": "fintech", "location": "Egypt"}, "next_agent": null, "action": "reply", "task_type": null, "search_query": null, "final_plan": null, "research_data": null, "rag_data": null, "gap_analysis": null, "research_offline": null, "research_online": null, "final_reply": "Here is a synthesis of the top startup accelerators in Egypt based on recent sources, focusing on those in Cairo and Alexandria, along with available details on their application processes. Note that specific application details are limited in the sources; most recommend checking official websites for current cycles, as processes typically involve online forms, pitch submissions, and interviews for early-stage startups.[1][2][3][4][5]

**Top Accelerators in Cairo:**
- **Falak Startups**: Cairo-based, backed by Egypt Ventures. Offers seed funding (up to EGP 2M), mentorship, and a 6-month program for seed to post-seed tech/innovation startups. Application: Via website; focuses on growth strategy and fundraising.[1][3]
- **Flat6Labs Cairo**: Leading MENA accelerator with seed funding, mentorship in tech, healthcare, fintech, climate, etc. Application: Online via flat6labs.com; cohort-based with equity for investment.[1][3][4]
- **Innoventures**: Early-stage funding and incubation (e.g., Startup Reactor) in tech, media, energy. Application: Submit via innoventures.vc.[1][4]
- **AUC Venture Lab (V-Lab)**: University-based at American University in Cairo, for tech-enabled startups (FinTech, EdTech, etc.). Over 130 investments. Application: Through aucventurerlab.org; open calls.[3][5]
- **GESR**: Early-stage tech/innovation support. Application details via gesr.com.[1][4]
- **Pmaestro**: Mentorship and funding for tech/innovation. Apply online.[1][4]
- **Startup MENA**: Industry-agnostic, mentorship and funding. Website application.[1][4]
- **MDI (Misr Digital Innovation)**: Tech-focused incubation. Contact via site.[1]

**Top Accelerators in Alexandria:**
- **AAST Entrepreneurship Center**: Supports agribusiness, tech, etc.; over 3600 startups. Application: Email ec@aast.edu or website; open to ideas.[2]
- **Founder Institute Alexandria**: Pre-seed, no idea required. Apply at fi.co; global program with local chapter.[2]
- **icealex / Startups of Alex**: Early-stage with workshops, labs. Apply via icealex.com or startupsofalex.untapcompete.com.[2]
- **Craft Pioneers / iceTech**: Creative/tech focus under icealex.[2]

For applications, processes are generally online submissions of team, idea, and traction details, followed by selection. Verify deadlines on official sites as they vary by cohort (e.g., Flat6Labs has regular batches).[1][2][7]"}
